  flags: -h/--help:bool, --merge-type:string, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string

[sheet.move-dimension]
  flags: --destination-index:string, --dimension:string, --end-index:string, -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --sheet-id:string, --start-index:string

[sheet.new]
  flags: -h/--help:bool, --name:string, --node:string

[sheet.range]
  commands: batch-clear, batch-set-style, clear, copy-to, fill, move-to, read, set-style, sort, update
  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --ranges:string, --type:string

  flags: --batch:string, --continue-on-error:bool, -h/--help:bool, --node:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --type:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --paste-type:string, --sheet-id:string, --source-range:string, --target-range:string, --target-sheet-id:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --sheet-id:string, --source-range:string, --target-range:string, --target-sheet-id:string

  aliases: get
  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --value-render-option:string

  flags: --bg-color:string, --bg-colors-json:string, --font-color:string, --font-colors-json:string, --font-size:int, --font-sizes-json:string, --font-weight:string, --font-weights-json:string, --h-align:string, --h-aligns-json:string, -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --number-format:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --v-align:string, --v-aligns-json:string, --word-wrap:string

  flags: --has-header:bool, -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --sort-keys:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --values:string

  flags: --find:string, -h/--help:bool, --include-hidden:bool, --match-case:bool, --match-entire-cell:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --replacement:string, --sheet-id:string, --use-regexp:bool

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --multi-select:bool, --node:string, --options:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: --cursor:string, -h/--help:bool, --limit:int, --query:string, --source:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string

  flags: --file:string, --height:int, -h/--help:bool, --mime-type:string, --name:string, --node:string, --range:string, --sheet-id:string, --width:int

  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --query:string, --source:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --task-id:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --task-id:string

  flags: --attachment-id:string, -h/--help:bool, --task-id:string

  flags: --executors:string, -h/--help:bool, --task-id:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --participants:string, --task-id:string

  flags: --done:string, --due:string, -h/--help:bool, --priority:string, --task-id:string, --title:string

  flags: --all:bool, --beta:bool, --check:bool, --force:bool, -h/--help:bool, --list:bool, --rollback:bool, --skip-skills:bool, --version:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool

[wiki]
  commands: member, node, space
  flags: -h/--help:bool

[wiki.member]
  commands: add, list, remove, update
  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --role:string, --users:string, --workspace:string

[wiki.member.list]
  aliases: ls
  flags: --filter-role:string, -h/--help:bool, --limit:int, --workspace:string

[wiki.member.remove]
  flags: -h/--help:bool, --users:string, --workspace:string

[wiki.member.update]
  flags: -h/--help:bool, --role:string, --users:string, --workspace:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: --folder:string, -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --workspace:string

  flags: --folder:string, -h/--help:bool, --name:string, --type:string, --workspace:string

[wiki.node.delete]
  flags: -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --workspace:string

  aliases: ls
  flags: --cursor:string, --folder:string, -h/--help:bool, --limit:int, --workspace:string

  flags: --folder:string, -h/--help:bool, --node:string, --workspace:string

[wiki.node.search]
  flags: --cursor:string, --extensions:stringSlice, -h/--help:bool, --limit:int, --query:string, --workspace:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --workspace:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --workspace:string

  flags: --cursor:string, -h/--help:bool, --limit:string, --type:string

  flags: -h/--help:bool, --limit:string, --query:string, --type:string
